title: Interest Topics (POI)
description: Manage interest extraction settings and review detected topics from conversations.

settings.llmModelHint: Defaults to the first available cloud model. You can pin a model or choose “Follow current session”.
settings.autoExtractHint: Extract interest topics automatically during conversations when thresholds are met — no manual clear or delete required.
settings.autoExtractIdleSecsHint: Also extract after this many seconds without new messages (e.g. 500 ≈ 8 minutes).

topics.title: Topics
topics.label: Label
topics.deleteConfirmContent: This permanently removes the interest topic and its conversation starters.
topics.clearConfirmContent: This permanently removes all stored interest topics and their starters.
